things.name: Faisal Mosque
things.description: Largest mosque in South Asia - a dramatic concrete desert tent shape at the foot of the Margallas

things.name: Margalla Hills National Park
things.description: Islamabad's forested mountain backdrop with hiking trails and the Daman-e-Koh viewpoint

things.name: Pakistan Monument
things.description: Flower-petal shaped national monument with a museum of Pakistan's history

things.name: Lok Virsa Museum
things.description: Excellent folk and traditional heritage museum with crafts from all provinces

things.name: Taxila Archaeological Museum
things.description: Day trip to the Gandhara civilization - Alexander the Great's easternmost city

things.name: Saidpur Model Village
things.description: Restored village in the Margalla Hills with artists' studios and traditional restaurants

things.name: Rose and Jasmine Garden
things.description: Botanical garden with over 250 species of roses

things.name: Trail 3 - Margalla Hills
things.description: Most popular hiking trail up into the forested hills with monkeys

things.name: F-7 Jinnah Super Market
things.description: Islamabad's most upscale shopping area with the best restaurants and cafes

things.name: Rawal Lake
things.description: City reservoir with paddleboats, a bird sanctuary and recreational facilities
